source_summary: A presumed-dead heiress returns under a false identity to destroy the cousin who stole her family empire.

source_chapters.title: The Return
source_chapters.summary: Nora returns to the city under the alias Eva Stone and appears at the family gala.

source_chapters.title: The Auction Trap
source_chapters.summary: Nora exposes a forged signature during a charity auction and attracts investor Adrian Vale.

production_constraints.notes: Favor elegant interiors and limited hero assets that can be reused across episodes.
